args.query: SELECT "Index", COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days, COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date LIKE '2018%' GROUP BY "Index" HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END)

val_args.query: SELECT "Index", COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days, COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date LIKE '2018%' GROUP BY "Index" HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) > COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END)

result.preview: "Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_2'] for use in execute_python.\nPreview:\n[{\"Index\": \"GSPTSE\", \"up_days\": 44, \"down_days\": 41}, {\"Index\": \"IXIC\", \"up_days\": 44, \"down_days\": 31}, {\"Index\": \"NYA\", \"up_days\": 37, \"down_days\": 42}]"

args.query: SELECT "Index", COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days, COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days FROM index_trade WHERE Date LIKE '2018%' AND "Index" IN ('NYA', 'IXIC', 'GSPTSE', '^NYA', '^IXIC', '^GSPTSE') GROUP BY "Index"
